data.content:
Planning complete for History Debugger feature. Plan creates 3 child knots:
1. foolery-59fb: Prompt builder (history-debug-prompt.ts) — buildDebugPrompt() + summarizeSessionEntries() + tests
2. foolery-742c: HistoryDebugPanel component — form (Expected/Actual Outcome) + embedded xterm.js terminal + SSE connection
3. foolery-e7a3: Integration into AgentHistoryView — Debug button, panel state, side-by-side layout

Key decisions: No new dependencies needed. No backend changes. Reuses existing terminal API (POST /api/terminal with prompt). Panel is ephemeral (local state, no Zustand store). Layout adjusts conversation log to flex row when debug panel is open.

Dependency chain: e7a3 (integration) depends on 59fb (prompt builder) and 742c (panel component).
